# Telemetry selectors report (1d)
# args: {__name__=~"e2etelemetry:const_one:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_zero:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum"}
# Results depend on the queried Prometheus instance and may differ elsewhere.
selectors:
  - selector: '{__name__=~"e2etelemetry:const_one:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_zero:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum"}'
    metrics:
      - name: e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: sum(e2e_nonexistent_const_dead)
          tree: |-
            └── e2e_nonexistent_const_dead
                  <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: |-
            label_replace(vector(10), "i", "a", "", "") or label_replace(vector(20), "i", "b", "", "")
            or
            label_replace(vector(30), "i", "c", "", "")
        labels:
          - name: i
            distinct_values: 3
            sample_values: [a, b, c]
      - name: e2etelemetry:const_one:gauge
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: vector(1)
      - name: e2etelemetry:const_zero:gauge
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: vector(0)
    failing_checks:
      count: 8
      messages:
        - metric "e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum" has 0 timeseries, source metrics may not exist or rule dependencies are not met
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:const_one:gauge" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:const_zero:gauge" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum" depends on "e2e_nonexistent_const_dead" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - matcher __name__=~"e2etelemetry:const_one:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_zero:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum" alternation is unsorted, consider using __name__=~"e2etelemetry:const_dead:sum|e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_one:gauge|e2etelemetry:const_zero:gauge"
        - metric "e2etelemetry:const_multi:gauge" label "i" has no matcher, consider adding one to bound cardinality, e.g. i=~"val1|val2"
